---
title: "TODOs"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _pages-nav.qmd >}}

## TODOs

- Broaden the framing beyond R. The principles apply identically to TypeScript, Rust, Go, and C++ projects — the only thing that changes is which test framework you reach for first. Add explicit examples from a non-R project once one matures here.
